overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through the outskirts of Night City. The route passes through a mix of commercial streets, desert landscapes with rocky cliffs, and industrial areas with distinctive futuristic architecture including an unfinished stadium and a building under construction on stilts. The drive occurs in bright daylight with clear skies, showcasing the game's detailed cyberpunk aesthetic.

events.description: pedestrians visible walking on right sidewalk near palm trees
approaching intersection with crosswalk markings visible ahead

massive concrete framework of a stadium or arena under construction with multiple support columns
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk, casting shadows on the pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit commercial street lined with palm trees. The camera, mounted on a vehicle, follows a silver sedan toward an intersection. A distinctive green commercial building with a teal roof occupies the left side, while ahead, the skeletal concrete framework of an unfinished stadium dominates the skyline. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks as the vehicle approaches the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with construction site featuring building on stilts

events.description: turning right at intersection, leaving commercial street for open construction area
passing large construction site with distinctive elevated building and yellow cranes

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the intersection, navigating around the corner with the construction site coming into full view on the left

notable_agents.action: dark SUV passing through the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: multi-story building under construction elevated on massive concrete stilts with yellow tower cranes attached
arid hillside with dry grass and sparse desert vegetation

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at the intersection, transitioning from the enclosed commercial street to a more open area. A striking construction site comes into view featuring a building elevated on concrete stilts with yellow cranes. The unfinished stadium recedes to the left background while arid desert terrain appears on the right. A dark SUV passes through the intersection as the camera navigates the turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved desert road with rocky cliffs and distant dam structure

distant concrete dam structure becomes visible between the canyon walls ahead

agents.ego_description: driving along a curved road that winds through desert terrain, with rocky cliffs on the left and views of the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk on the right side of the road

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock formations and arid hills with sparse vegetation
massive concrete dam structure visible between the canyon walls in the distance
futuristic high-rise buildings of the city center visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The road curves left through an open desert landscape, revealing towering reddish-brown rock cliffs on the left. In the distance, a massive concrete dam structure becomes visible between the canyon walls. The downtown skyline with futuristic skyscrapers appears on the right horizon. The environment shifts from urban construction to natural desert terrain with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with digital billboards and circular stadium structure

passing the Pharmaceutics building with distinctive circular rooftop sign

agents.ego_description: driving through a commercial strip lined with digital advertisements and utility poles, passing other vehicles and pedestrians

wooden power poles with multiple crossbars and electrical wires

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions back to urban commercial infrastructure with tall digital billboards lining the street. The distinctive Pharmaceutics building with its circular rooftop sign appears on the right. A large circular stadium structure becomes visible on the left while the downtown skyscrapers loom larger in the center distance. The road is lined with utility poles and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with graffiti-covered warehouse approaching intersection

events.description: passing large circular stadium structure on left, entering industrial area
slowing down alongside industrial building covered in graffiti
approaching intersection, preparing to turn left back toward starting point

agents.ego_description: slowing down while driving past a graffiti-covered industrial warehouse, approaching the intersection to complete the loop back to the starting area

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk near the graffiti-covered wall

entered.detail: industrial warehouse building with large 66th STREET graffiti and American flag mural, covered in various tags
metal chain-link fencing running along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows down while passing a large industrial warehouse covered in extensive graffiti including '66th STREET' lettering. The circular stadium recedes behind as the camera approaches the intersection. The green commercial building from the start becomes visible again ahead, indicating the completion of the loop. A pedestrian walks along the sidewalk next to a chain-link fence as the vehicle prepares to turn.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that begins in a sunlit commercial district, ventures through a rugged desert canyon, and eventually loops back to its urban starting point. It begins on a palm-lined street following a silver sedan toward an unfinished stadium, before turning right at an intersection to pass a building elevated on concrete stilts and yellow cranes. As the road curves left, the urban construction gives way to an open desert landscape featuring towering reddish-brown cliffs and a massive concrete dam, with the distant downtown skyline appearing on the horizon. The scene then shifts back toward commercial infrastructure, passing tall digital billboards and the circular sign of a Pharmaceutics building as the skyscrapers loom larger. Finally, the camera slows past a graffiti-covered industrial warehouse before the original green commercial building reappears ahead, completing the circuit.
